name: EL Diamante Jewelry & Pawn #3
description_short: Miami family-owned pawn chain offering collateral-based loans and buying/selling gold, jewelry, diamonds, luxury watches, firearms, and electronics across multiple Miami-Dade locations.
description_long:
EL Diamante, Inc. is a family-owned pawn and jewelry enterprise headquartered in Miami, FL, with approximately 35 years of continuous operation under the leadership of owner and president Alexander O. Ruiz. The company operates multiple retail locations across Miami-Dade County, including storefronts in the Little Havana neighborhood (West Flagler Street) and Cutler Bay (South Dixie Highway). EL Diamante holds a Federal Firearms License (FFL #1-59-086-02-6H-50366, valid through August 2026) and operates under Florida's pawnbroker licensing requirements. It is not BBB accredited and carries no rating from the Better Business Bureau, which cites insufficient information on file despite a BBB record dating to 2007.

The company's core offering is the collateral-based pawn loan — a short-term cash advance secured by personal property. Customers bring in items of value, receive an in-store appraisal, and can walk out with immediate cash; the item is held as collateral until the loan is repaid or forfeited. Beyond lending, EL Diamante actively buys and sells gold, loose diamonds, luxury watches, new and pre-owned jewelry, firearms, electronics, tools, and musical instruments. As a licensed FFL dealer, the chain can legally accept firearms as pawn collateral and resell them — a capability uncommon among general-merchandise pawn shops. The company also lists merchandise on the Buya.com online marketplace, extending its buyer reach beyond walk-in traffic and offering a 100% money-back guarantee on non-"as-is" Buya purchases.

What distinguishes EL Diamante in Miami's competitive pawn landscape is its multi-generational, family-run structure and staying power — roughly 35 years of operation is notable for an independent pawn chain. The multi-location footprint across Miami-Dade serves distinct communities, including Little Havana and Cutler Bay. The company submits acquired items to local and national law enforcement databases, a transparency practice that signals ethical sourcing. The #3 location carries a 5.0/5 Google rating from 64 reviews, reflecting consistently strong customer satisfaction at that storefront.

For consumers needing fast cash, EL Diamante delivers the core pawn shop proposition: no credit check, no application process, and same-visit funding. However, pawn loans are inherently high-cost short-term instruments, and specific rates or fee schedules are not published online — all terms are negotiated in-store and governed by Florida pawnbroker statutes. There is no mobile app or online loan management portal. Sunday hours are unavailable, and weekday hours close at 5:30 PM, which may limit accessibility for working adults. EL Diamante is not a nonprofit, credit union, or CDFI, and offers no financial counseling or debt management services. It is a practical option for Miami-area residents who need immediate liquidity against valuables, not a low-cost borrowing alternative.

pricing.guarantee_details: 100% money-back guarantee applies only to items purchased through the Buya.com online marketplace, excluding items sold as-is. No in-store return policy verified.

pros: Approximately 35 years of family-owned operation with deep roots in the Miami-Dade community
Licensed FFL firearms dealer (#1-59-086-02-6H-50366) — can legally buy, pawn, and resell firearms, a rare capability for a pawn shop
5.0/5 Google rating from 64 reviews at the #3 location reflects strong customer satisfaction
Multiple Miami-Dade locations (Little Havana on W Flagler St and Cutler Bay on S Dixie Hwy) for geographic convenience
Items submitted to law enforcement databases — signals ethically sourced, verified merchandise
Online sales available via Buya.com marketplace with 100% money-back guarantee on eligible purchases
No credit check required for pawn loans — accessible regardless of credit history
cons: Loan rates, interest charges, and fee schedules are not published online — terms must be negotiated in-store on a per-transaction basis
Not BBB accredited; BBB assigns a Not Rated (NR) status due to insufficient information on file
No mobile app or online portal for loan tracking, renewal, or account management
Store hours limited to Mon–Sat 9:30 AM–5:30 PM; closed Sundays — inconvenient for working adults
Pawn loans are high-cost short-term instruments and not a substitute for conventional credit or lower-APR lending options
best_for: Miami-area residents who need immediate cash against collateral without a credit check or application process
Buyers seeking discounted pre-owned gold, loose diamonds, luxury watches, or jewelry in Miami-Dade County
Legal firearms buyers and sellers in Florida seeking a licensed FFL dealer for pawn or direct sale transactions
Sellers looking to liquidate electronics, tools, musical instruments, or jewelry quickly for cash
diagnosis: EL Diamante Jewelry & Pawn #3 is best suited for Miami-area consumers who need fast, collateral-based cash with no credit requirements, or shoppers hunting for discounted pre-owned jewelry and merchandise across multiple convenient South Florida locations. Its 35-year track record, FFL licensing, and strong customer ratings make it a credible and established choice in the local pawn market. The primary caveat is that pawn loan costs are undisclosed online and are typically high relative to conventional credit — this is not an appropriate solution for those seeking affordable financing.
services: New and pre-owned jewelry buying and selling
Firearm buying, selling, and pawning (FFL licensed)
Online merchandise sales via Buya.com marketplace
